title: Document packaging process
body:
High-level overview of packaging, intended for Linux distros.

Closes: RUN-1356

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
Document the process for packaging Podman for a new Linux distro
```

comments.body: Thank you! I meant to mark this `draft` yesterday, have just done so. My goal was to get preliminary feedback. It sounds like this is the desired approach, so I will continue polishing it up.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago*, *Luap99* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [Luap99,edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
